title: Tunisie à Paris
voiceover: Bienvenue au coeur de la ville, où les saveurs de Tunisie vous attendent.

scenes.prompt: Camera pans over the Eiffel Tower, with the sound of a bustling street in the background. The camera then zooms in on a small Tunisian restaurant, with the sign 'Tunisie à Paris' displayed prominently. The lighting is warm and inviting, with a hint of Mediterranean flair.

The camera cuts to a shot of a delicious-looking Tunisian dish being prepared in the kitchen, with the chef expertly chopping vegetables and spices. The camera then cuts to a shot of the finished dish, garnished with fresh herbs and served on a colorful plate.

The camera cuts to a shot of a happy customer taking a bite of the dish, with a look of delight on their face. The camera then cuts to a shot of the restaurant's interior, with customers laughing and chatting over plates of food.

The camera cuts to a shot of the restaurant's exterior, with the sign 'Tunisie à Paris' displayed prominently. The camera then zooms out to show the bustling street, with people walking in all directions.

The camera cuts to a shot of the finished video, with the title 'Tunisie à Paris' displayed on screen. The voiceover says ' Venez découvrir les saveurs de Tunisie à Paris' (Come and discover the flavors of Tunisia in Paris).
